name: Planning Workspace
allowed_roles: Planning Authority; Department Planning Officer; Procurement Planner; Finance/Budget Officer
notes: Do not expose policy masters to ordinary requestors.

name: Requisition Workspace
allowed_roles: Requestor; Head of Department; Finance/Budget Officer; Procurement Officer; Head of Procurement

name: Supplier Governance Workspace
allowed_roles: Supplier Registration Officer; Head of Procurement; Internal Auditor
notes: Supplier portal users should never see this desk workspace.

name: Tender Management Workspace
allowed_roles: Procurement Officer; Head of Procurement; Internal Auditor
notes: Do not grant to supplier or evaluation roles.

name: Opening Workspace
allowed_roles: Opening Committee Member; Tender Committee Secretary; Internal Auditor

name: Evaluation Workspace
allowed_roles: Evaluation Committee Member; Evaluation Committee Chair; Tender Committee Secretary; Internal Auditor

name: Award Workspace
allowed_roles: Procurement Officer; Head of Procurement; Accounting Officer / Approving Authority; Internal Auditor
notes: Committee members usually read-only after recommendation.

name: Contract Management Workspace
allowed_roles: Contract Manager; Inspection & Acceptance Officer; Accounts Payable Officer; Finance/Budget Officer; Internal Auditor

name: Permitted Documents for User
notes: Use during UAT of row-level permissions.

name: Tender Full Audit Trail
allowed_roles: Internal Auditor; Oversight Viewer; Head of Procurement
notes: Should not expose sealed payload fields unless designed carefully.

name: Budget vs Committed vs Actual
allowed_roles: Finance/Budget Officer; Accounting Officer / Approving Authority; Internal Auditor

name: Evaluation Progress Report
allowed_roles: Tender Committee Secretary; Evaluation Committee Chair; Internal Auditor
notes: Do not expose competitor price data in generic reports.
